title: CaseResponse
description: Schema for CaseResponse in Nuix REST API

creationDate.description: The date/time this case was created, in milliseconds since epoch

compound.description: Whether this case is Simple or Compound

elastic.description: Whether this is an Elastic case

binaryStoreLocation.description: The binary store location for this case, if applicable

caseSize.description: The size of the case on disk, in bytes

casePathParent.description: Path to the parent directory of the case

caseInvestigationTimeZone.description: The investigation time zone, e.g. America/New_York

hasExclusions.description: True if the case has exclusions

hasNuixSystemTags.description: True if the case has Nuix system tags

hasProductionSets.description: True if the case has production sets

hasCalculatedAuditSize.description: True if the case has a calculated audit size
